title: Youth/Student Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Youth/Student Support Groups 7 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HEARTS UNKNOWN EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides art and music classes. 184 NE Franklin Avenue Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Ages 5-18 who are experiencing difficulties with their emotions Hours: Tuesday-Wednesday 4pm-7pm Email (541) 213-0679 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services, including counseling, support groups, violence and anger prevention training, life skills groups, parenting classes, new parenting groups, crime victims support, community information and referral and temporary housing. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Ages 6-21 and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPHELIA'S PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps girls make healthy life choices through empowerment, education, and support. Provides on-site after-school programs and individual, family, and group therapy. Also provides services in schools, including classroom presentations, girl support groups, and staff training in the areas of healthy relationships, bullying and harassment, healthy body image, and digital safety. Offers professional development training for people-serving organizations, nonprofits, and businesses. 1577 Pearl Street Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Ages 10-18 who identify as female Hours: By appointment: Monday-Thursday 10am-6pm After School Drop-in hours: Monday-Thursday 3pm-6pm Email (541) 284-4333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TODOS JUNTOS BAKER PRAIRIE MIDDLE SCHOOL MIDDLE SCHOOL PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides after-school programming for youth, including academic enrichment, recreation and leadership opportunities and drug and alcohol prevention. Also provides parenting support for participating families. Uses the "PreventNet model" in collaboration with other community agencies to provide school-based services to children, youth and families. 1859 S Township Road Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Middle school students and their families Hours: Varies by program Email (503) 383-9041 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TODOS JUNTOS CEDAR RIDGE MIDDLE SCHOOL MIDDLE SCHOOL PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides after-school programming for youth, including academic enrichment, recreation and leadership opportunities and drug and alcohol prevention.
